Package software.amazon.lambda.durable.otel

Class MdcSpanEnricher

java.lang.Object
software.amazon.lambda.durable.otel.MdcSpanEnricher
@Deprecated public final class MdcSpanEnricher extends Object
Deprecated.
This is a preview API that is experimental and may be changed or removed in future releases.
Injects OTel trace/span IDs into SLF4J MDC for log-trace correlation.

When used with structured logging (Log4j2 JSON, Logback JSON), these MDC fields appear in every log line, enabling tools like CloudWatch Logs Insights and Datadog to correlate logs with traces.

MDC keys injected:

  • trace_id — the W3C trace ID (32 hex chars)
  • span_id — the current span ID (16 hex chars)
  • durable.execution.arn — the execution ARN

Usage: Call #inject() in onUserFunctionStart (after span is active) and clear() in onUserFunctionEnd. Or use the convenience plugin OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin which handles this automatically when MDC enrichment is enabled.
